mapper.sql: cdh.id, cdh.detail_id, cdh.employee_id, cdh.enabled_flag, cdh.attribute1, cdh.attribute2, cdh.attribute3, cdh.attribute4, cdh.type, cdh.year, cdh.dept, cdh.department, cdh.team, cdh.job, cdh.cost_center_num, cdh.status, cdh.export_flag, isnull(cdh.suit1, 0) as suit1, isnull(cdh.suit2, 0) as suit2, isnull(cdh.suit3, 0) as suit3, isnull(cdh.suit4, 0) as suit4,isnull(cdh.family_clothing1,0) as family_clothing1, isnull(cdh.family_clothing2,0) as family_clothing2, isnull(cdh.family_clothing3, 0) as family_clothing3, isnull(cdh.family_clothing4, 0) as family_clothing4, isnull(cdh.summer_working_clothes1, 0) as summer_working_clothes1, isnull(cdh.summer_working_clothes2, 0) as summer_working_clothes2, isnull(cdh.summer_working_clothes3, 0) as summer_working_clothes3, isnull(cdh.winter_working_clothes1, 0) as winter_working_clothes1, isnull(cdh.winter_working_clothes2, 0) as winter_working_clothes2, isnull(cdh.post_sale_clothing1, 0) as post_sale_clothing1, isnull(cdh.post_sale_clothing2, 0) as post_sale_clothing2, isnull( cdh.post_sale_clothing3, 0) as post_sale_clothing3, isnull(cdh.post_sale_clothing4, 0) as post_sale_clothing4, isnull(cdh.post_sale_clothing5, 0) as post_sale_clothing5, isnull(cdh.dining_clothes1, 0) as dining_clothes1, isnull(cdh.dining_clothes2, 0) as dining_clothes2, isnull(cdh.security_clothes1, 0) as security_clothes1, isnull(cdh.security_clothes2, 0) as security_clothes2, isnull(cdh.security_clothes3, 0) as security_clothes3, isnull(cdh.security_clothes4, 0) as security_clothes4, cdh.create_time, cdh.create_by, cdh.update_time, cdh.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.detail_id as ${tAlias}_detail_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.year as ${tAlias}_year, ${tAlias}.dept as ${tAlias}_dept, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.job as ${tAlias}_job, ${tAlias}.cost_center_num as ${tAlias}_cost_center_num, ${tAlias}.status as ${tAlias}_status, ${tAlias}.export_flag as ${tAlias}_export_flag, ${tAlias}.suit1 as ${tAlias}_suit1, ${tAlias}.suit2 as ${tAlias}_suit2, ${tAlias}.suit3 as ${tAlias}_suit3, ${tAlias}.suit4 as ${tAlias}_suit4, ${tAlias}.family_clothing1 as ${tAlias}_family_clothing1, ${tAlias}.family_clothing2 as ${tAlias}_family_clothing2, ${tAlias}.family_clothing3 as ${tAlias}_family_clothing3, ${tAlias}.family_clothing4 as ${tAlias}_family_clothing4, ${tAlias}.summer_working_clothes1 as ${tAlias}_summer_working_clothes1, ${tAlias}.summer_working_clothes2 as ${tAlias}_summer_working_clothes2, ${tAlias}.summer_working_clothes3 as ${tAlias}_summer_working_clothes3, ${tAlias}.winter_working_clothes1 as ${tAlias}_winter_working_clothes1, ${tAlias}.winter_working_clothes2 as ${tAlias}_winter_working_clothes2, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing1 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing1, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing2 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing2, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing3 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing3, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing4 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing4, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing5 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing5, ${tAlias}.dining_clothes1 as ${tAlias}_dining_clothes1, ${tAlias}.dining_clothes2 as ${tAlias}_dining_clothes2, ${tAlias}.security_clothes1 as ${tAlias}_security_clothes1, ${tAlias}.security_clothes2 as ${tAlias}_security_clothes2, ${tAlias}.security_clothes3 as ${tAlias}_security_clothes3, ${tAlias}.security_clothes4 as ${tAlias}_security_clothes4, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
, (select isnull(pe.name, '') from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.id = cdh.update_by where fu.enabled_flag =1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1) as update_by_str from cm_detail_history cdh
mapper.insert: insert into cm_detail_history (detail_id, employee_id, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, type, year, dept, department, team, job, cost_center_num, status, export_flag, suit1, suit2, suit3, suit4, family_clothing1, family_clothing2, family_clothing3, family_clothing4, summer_working_clothes1, summer_working_clothes2, summer_working_clothes3, winter_working_clothes1, winter_working_clothes2, post_sale_clothing1, post_sale_clothing2, post_sale_clothing3, post_sale_clothing4, post_sale_clothing5, dining_clothes1, dining_clothes2, security_clothes1, security_clothes2, security_clothes3, security_clothes4, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{detailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exportFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{suit1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{suit2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{suit3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{suit4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{familyClothing1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{familyClothing2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{familyClothing3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{familyClothing4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{summerWorkingClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{summerWorkingClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{summerWorkingClothes3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{winterWorkingClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{winterWorkingClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing5,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{diningClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{diningClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{securityClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{securityClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{securityClothes3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{securityClothes4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update cm_detail_history set detail_id = #{detailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, year = #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dept = #{dept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job = #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center_num = #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, export_flag = #{exportFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, suit1 = #{suit1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, suit2 = #{suit2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, suit3 = #{suit3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, suit4 = #{suit4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, family_clothing1 = #{familyClothing1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, family_clothing2 = #{familyClothing2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, family_clothing3 = #{familyClothing3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, family_clothing4 = #{familyClothing4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, summer_working_clothes1 = #{summerWorkingClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, summer_working_clothes2 = #{summerWorkingClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, summer_working_clothes3 = #{summerWorkingClothes3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, winter_working_clothes1 = #{winterWorkingClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, winter_working_clothes2 = #{winterWorkingClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing1 = #{postSaleClothing1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing2 = #{postSaleClothing2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing3 = #{postSaleClothing3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing4 = #{postSaleClothing4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing5 = #{postSaleClothing5,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dining_clothes1 = #{diningClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dining_clothes2 = #{diningClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, security_clothes1 = #{securityClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, security_clothes2 = #{securityClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, security_clothes3 = #{securityClothes3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, security_clothes4 = #{securityClothes4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into cm_detail_history (detail_id, employee_id, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, type, year, dept, department, team, job, cost_center_num, status, export_flag, suit1, suit2, suit3, suit4, family_clothing1, family_clothing2, family_clothing3, family_clothing4, summer_working_clothes1, summer_working_clothes2, summer_working_clothes3, winter_working_clothes1, winter_working_clothes2, post_sale_clothing1, post_sale_clothing2, post_sale_clothing3, post_sale_clothing4, post_sale_clothing5, dining_clothes1, dining_clothes2, security_clothes1, security_clothes2, security_clothes3, security_clothes4, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) select id, employee_id, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, type, year, dept, department, team, job, cost_center_num, status, export_flag, suit1, suit2, suit3, suit4, family_clothing1, family_clothing2, family_clothing3, family_clothing4, summer_working_clothes1, summer_working_clothes2, summer_working_clothes3, winter_working_clothes1, winter_working_clothes2, post_sale_clothing1, post_sale_clothing2, post_sale_clothing3, post_sale_clothing4, post_sale_clothing5, dining_clothes1, dining_clothes2, security_clothes1, security_clothes2, security_clothes3, security_clothes4, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by from cm_detail where id=#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
